title: Shapes Galore!
description: Ovals, lines, and labels. Focus: what each parameter means.

flashcards.definition: Draws an oval centered at (centerX, centerY). width is total left-to-right size, height is total top-to-bottom size.
Draws a line from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2).
Draws text on the canvas. If value contains letters, it must be in quotes.
Labels can have properties like size, bold, italic, and font.

quiz.prompt: What do the numbers mean in Oval(centerX, centerY, width, height)?
options: The center position and the oval's width/height
The top-left corner and the oval's radius
quiz.feedbackCorrect: Correct: an oval is centered at (centerX, centerY) with the given width and height.
quiz.feedbackIncorrect: Oval uses centerX, centerY, width, height.

quiz.feedbackCorrect: Correct: a line uses two endpoints.
quiz.feedbackIncorrect: A line uses two endpoints: (x1,y1) and (x2,y2).

quiz.prompt: Which Label value must be in quotes?
quiz.feedbackCorrect: Correct: if it contains letters, it must be in quotes.
quiz.feedbackIncorrect: Labels with letters must be inside quotes like 'Hello'.
